description: Extract or expose renderer-neutral compact terminal rows for both Web Chat and Ink CLI renderers.

userStories.title: Create renderer-neutral terminal view-model boundary
userStories.description: As a CLI implementer, I need compact terminal row generation in a shared module so Ink rendering can reuse Web Chat trace mapping without importing Web components.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a shared terminal view-model boundary such as src/session-ui or an approved equivalent
Expose compact row, line, token, status, and detail types through the shared boundary
Expose buildCompactTerminalRows and value normalization helpers through the shared boundary
Shared modules do not import React DOM, browser APIs, Tailwind/CSS, Virtuoso, lucide-react, or Ink
userStories.notes: Implemented and validated in PRD 02 shared terminal view-model batch.

userStories.title: Migrate Web compact terminal to shared row model
userStories.description: As a Web UI maintainer, I want the Web compact terminal to consume the shared row model without changing browser behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Update Web compact terminal imports to use the shared boundary or compatibility re-exports
Do not intentionally change Web compact terminal presentation or registry behavior
userStories.notes: Implemented and validated in PRD 02 shared terminal view-model batch.

userStories.title: Add compact row fixture tests
userStories.description: As a runtime engineer, I want deterministic tests for compact row generation so Web and CLI rendering stay consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests or fixtures for user message, assistant message, tool call, tool result, yielded run, and error rows
Tests cover long text truncation, JSON-like values, empty values, and missing optional fields
Tests assert deterministic row output without rendering React
userStories.notes: Implemented and validated in PRD 02 shared terminal view-model batch.
